name: Frisk (Adult) - Undertale / The True Human in Control [Canon+My Headcanon Mixed]
description:
"Despite everything, it's still you..."

Idk how i actually did menage to finish this in the end, why you might ask? Oh well alr short unfortunate summary of what i think of this bot compared to the others. I actually think It has a lot of potential however since i brought this same format 2 times consecutively already and this Is the third time, i do found myself out of idea and inspiration. I think it's cool to do unique things that follow a format however in the late end It becomes a problem if you run out of scenario ideas, seriously i felt soulless meanwhile i was testing and making this, honest opinion and vote i do give myself this time it's a 5/10, i simply felt stressed and forced meanwhile doing this.

Link to the Artist and Arts used:

  • https://x.com/SZukafu

  • https://x.com/SZukafu/status/1779233779179270480?t=KaZvjeeF7X_ar4I2GjQ_zA&s=19

  • https://x.com/SZukafu/status/1771936277635428742?t=I2ybzEpE39NPS5IZRdDGFA&s=19

    Yeah these are a few, go check out the rest yourself on their profile btw. Also Zukafu is an NSFW artist so you must log in to see all the posts

None, this time it's no dead dove. But the warning can be for anything as you can write any lore you want in the fourth Scenario.

All characters are aged up (18+).

This Is any!pov and generally all the scenario are Wide open for any kind of route or scene. Frisk has reset countless time and knows all the routes and choices already

  • First Scenario: you wake up on a bed of golden flowers, you don't know If you did fall inside the underground or you lived inside here already, you just are awaken by Frisk and then you remember who you are and what you were going to do. (Basically inspired by Danganronpa 2 goodbye despair, the start where you are awaken by Nagito)

  • Second Scenario (Semi-smut or sorta of based on what you are going to do): you find Frisk drunk at the Grillby's, literally drunk as hell after drinking a bit too much and She dosen't remember a single thing

  • Third Scenario (Fan service ofc): It has been a lot of time since Frisk decided to remain inside the underground, a lot of things happen and then boom! Out of nowhere they decided to go on a Summer vacation... Honestly idk if it's actually Summer month. Since time Is unknown in the underground.

  • Fourth Scenario: blank space. Just Frisk RELOADING SAVE FILE, you write/decide the lore/story and everything. (Replaced two extra scenario)
creator: ThatDistantPerson
